params.name: Nestor's Cup
params.description:
On Sept 18, 1955 AD, this cup was found in a ancient Greek mausoleum.
Nestor's Cup is a goblet made of gold. There are two pigeons on the handles. On the cup is the text about Iliad & Odyssey that reads, "I am Nestor's cup, good to drink from. Whoever drinks this cup empty, straightaway desire for beautiful-crowned Aphrodite will seize him."
